overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through moonlit grasslands at night. The character travels along a dirt path, encounters a horse-drawn carriage, and crosses a wooden bridge in a rural prairie setting with dramatic cloud formations overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with dirt path under moonlight

events.description: character raises hand to face briefly then continues walking
character turns head to survey surroundings while walking

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass, occasionally glancing around at the landscape

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the grassland
tall green grass swaying in the breeze on the left side of the path
tall green grass swaying in the breeze on the right side of the path
solitary oak trees dotting the prairie landscape
solitary oak trees dotting the prairie landscape
bright full moon illuminating the night sky through scattered clouds
rolling hills visible on the horizon under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a narrow dirt path through an open prairie at night. Tall grass flanks both sides of the trail while scattered oak trees dot the landscape. The full moon shines through scattered clouds, casting dramatic shadows across the rolling hills in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie path with horse-drawn carriage crossing

events.description: character turns slightly to the left while continuing to walk forward
horse-drawn carriage approaches from the right and passes in front of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horse-drawn carriage crosses ahead, stepping slightly to avoid the wagon

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses and driver moving from right to left across the path

entered.detail: dark wooden carriage with two black horses and a driver, moving at a trot across the field
parallel ruts in the dirt path left by previous wagon traffic

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as a horse-drawn carriage crosses the path from right to left. The carriage passes close by, leaving visible wheel tracks in the dirt. The character steps slightly to the side to let the horses pass before continuing along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie path with wagon tracks leading to wooden bridge

events.description: character approaches and begins crossing a small wooden bridge over a dry creek bed

agents.ego_description: walking along the path following the wagon tracks, approaching and crossing a wooden bridge

entered.detail: small wooden plank bridge with simple railings crossing a shallow depression

segments.scene_description: The character follows the wagon wheel tracks along the dirt path through the continuing grassland. As the character approaches, a small wooden bridge becomes visible spanning a dry creek bed. The character steps onto the bridge and begins to cross, with the moon still visible through the cloudy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit prairie path that leads from open grasslands toward a rustic wooden bridge. It begins with the character walking steadily through tall grass and scattered oak trees under a cloudy night sky that casts dramatic shadows across rolling hills. As the journey continues, the camera tracks the character stepping aside to let a horse-drawn carriage cross the trail from right to left. The scene then shifts to follow the fresh wagon wheel tracks left in the dirt, moving deeper into the grassland. Finally, the path opens up to a small wooden bridge spanning a dry creek bed, which the character begins to cross while the full moon remains visible above.
